title: Task Force Organization
summary: Organizing fleet elements into effective task forces for specific missions.
details: Organize task forces by mission: strike groups for offensive, screening forces for defense, escort groups for protection, scouts for reconnaissance. Balance capabilities within groups: include anti-fighter, anti-capital, point defense. Assign commanders who understand the mission. Task forces should be self-sufficient for their assigned mission. Reorganize between operations based on losses and objectives.
annotations: Organization shapes capability - design for mission.
